title: June 2019 Endgame
body:
This is the endgame schedule for [June 2019 Iteration](https://github.com/actionscore/actions/issues/1).

## Schedule

End game master: @msfussell 
End game buddy: @yaron2 
06/24 Code freeze for the endgame
07/01 Endgame complete
07/02 Release date

**Monday 24th** - Prepare endgame

- [x] Code freeze at **5pm PST**
- [x] Update build pipeline with version support @lukekim 
- [x] Set version environment variable in build & release pipelines @yaron2 
- [x] Create release branch @yaron2 
- [x] Complete final build
- [x] Manually test Build
  - [x] Demo scenario validation @Haishi2016
- [x] All closed feature-requests have a verification-needed tag

**Tuesday 25th**- Fixing and testing

- [x] Remind team members to assign issues that they intend to fix to the current milestone
- [x] Fixing
- [x] Testing
- [x] Verification
- [x] Test Build
   - [x] Build successful for all platforms
 
**Wednesday 26th** - Fixing and testing
- [x] Remind team members to assign issues that they intend to fix to the current milestone
- [x] Fixing
- [x] Testing
- [x] Verification
- [x] Test Build 
   - [x] Build successful for all platforms

**Thursday 27th** - High Priority fixing and testing
 
- [x]  Fixing (scrutiny sets in - major bugs only - to be discussed in stand-up meeting, labeled as "candidate" 
- [x] Release notes updated @yaron2 @msfussell #48
    - release notes are collected in a file named Month_Year.md in this docs repo directory.
- [x] All issues verified
- [x] Create candidate release
- [ ] Zero to hero samples @ryanvolum #45 #46 
- [x] Demo scenario validation @Haishi2016
- [x] Sanity check of each candidate release build
  - [x] Windows
    - [x] x64 (done via samples)
  - [x] OS X
    - [x] x64 (done via samples/demos)
  - [x] Linux
    - [x] x64 (done via samples)
    - [x] ARM @likamrat

**Friday/Monday 1st** - High Priority fixing and testing

- [x] Announce July master is open for business 
- [x] Polish release notes 
- [x] Cherry-pick hand-picked and reviewed changes to /docs/release/<x.y>
- [x] Documentation updated 
- [x] Create new candidate release if needed
  - [x] Sanity check of each candidate release build
    - [x] Windows
      - [x] x64
    - [x] OS X
      - [x] x64
    - [x] Linux
      - [x] x64
      - [x] ARM
- [x] Release notes sign-off
- [x] Final demo scenario validation
- [x] Add a git tag to HEAD of <x.y> in format x.y.z
